subject: [RFC PATCH 17/45] mm: page_alloc: add within-superpageblock compaction for clean superpageblocks

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch extends the superpageblock defragmentation framework to handle clean superpageblocks in addition to tainted ones. It introduces a new compaction logic that migrates pages within the same superpageblock to consolidate scattered free pages into whole free pageblocks. The key components include a dispatcher function, a custom migration target allocator, and modifications to existing functions to make them superpageblock-aware. This patch aims to improve memory defragmentation efficiency by reducing fragmentation within clean superpageblocks.
